const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pymupdf python - <<'PY'
import fitz
src = fitz.open('/tmp/scotus-25-1218-petition.pdf')

    pix.save(f'/tmp/scotus-25-1218-page-{i+1}.png')
print(f'rendered {len(src)} pages')
PY
